zh.lifeSummary: 當Aline de Gai於1159年出生在英國維爾爾時，她的父親Philip de Gai Lord of Wooton Basset37歲，母親Cecily Berkeley24歲。她於1178年與Sir Alan Basset在英國巴金哈姆爾希 維可姆結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和7個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Aline de Gai于1159年出生在英国維爾爾时，她的父亲Philip de Gai Lord of Wooton Basset37岁，母亲Cecily Berkeley24岁。她于1178年与Sir Alan Basset在英国巴金哈姆爾希 維可姆结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和7个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gai
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 蓋, meaning ‘lid’ or ‘build’ in Chinese: (i) from the placename Gai (蓋), the name of a fief (located in Shandong province) granted to an official in the state of Qi during the Warring States period (475–221  BC ). (ii) adopted as the surname by the Ge Lou (蓋樓) family from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ).
Italian (Piedmont): from French surname Gai, Gay literally ‘cheerful’; in some cases it is possible a nickname from dialect word gai ‘jay’.
Italian (Tuscany): patronymic or plural form of Gaio, Gaia .

variants.name: Kai
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Ritsuko, Takashi, Akiko, Chitose, Hidetaka, Hisashi, Kaoru, Kumiko, Mamoru, Masakazu, Masaru, Masayuki.

Japanese: original meaning could be 貝 ‘shell’, but the name is written phonetically with two characters 甲斐 ‘tortoise shell’ and ‘beauty’. Though the surname is found mostly in the island of Kyūshū, some families could have connections with the ancient province of Kai (now Yamanashi prefecture) in the mountains of central Honshū, whose name is written with the two characters above.
Chinese: alternative Mandarin form of the surname 蓋, see   Gai   1.

variants.name: Gaia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Camillo, Angelo, Sylvio.
Italian: from the personal name Gaia, feminine form of Gaio (from Latin Caius, Gaius).
Portuguese: habitational name from Gaia in northern Portugal.

variants.name: Cai
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Li, Hong, Xin, Yang, Feng, Jian, Liming, Ming, Rong, Yi, Hui.  Vietnamese Quan, Anh, Chau, Dinh, Huong Thi, Huyen, Khiem, Loan Kim, Long, Nga, Nhi, Oanh.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 蔡, originally referring to ‘the tortoise used in ancient rituals of divination’ in Chinese: from the placename Cai (蔡), a fief (originally located in Shangcai in Henan province) which was granted to Du, also known as Cai Shu (蔡叔), son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (1152–1056  BC ). Later Cai Shu plotted rebellions and was eventually sent into exile. But his son, Hu, also known as Cai Zhong (蔡仲), was a revered man and was granted the fief of Cai (蔡), which later became a state during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). After it was annexed by the state of Chu in 447  BC , the name of the state was adopted as a surname.
Catalan (Girona and Alicante; Caí): possibly from the Biblical personal name Caín ‘Cain’.

nameMeanings.name: Aline
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: In the Middle Ages this represented a contracted form of Adeline . In modern use it is either a revival of this or a respelling of Aileen . In Scotland and Ireland it has sometimes been chosen as representing an Anglicized spelling of the Gaelic vocabulary word àlainn (Scottish), álainn (Irish), meaning ‘lovely’.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Aline de Gai was born in 1159, in Wiltshire, England, her father, Philip de Gai Lord of Wooton Basset, was 37 and her mother, Cecily Berkeley, was 24. She married Sir Alan Basset in 1178, in High Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 7 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aline de Gai est née en 1159, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Philip de Gai Lord of Wooton Basset, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Cecily Berkeley, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Alan Basset en 1178, à High Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 7 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Aline de Gai 1159 in Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Philip de Gai Lord of Wooton Basset 37 und ihre Mutter Cecily Berkeley 24. Sie hat 1178 in High Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England Sir Alan Basset geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 7 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Aline de Gai è nata il nel 1159 nel Wiltshire, England, sua padre, Philip de Gai Lord of Wooton Basset, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Cecily Berkeley, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Sir Alan Basset nel 1178, nel High Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 7 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Aline de Gaiが1159年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアで生まれた時，父Philip de Gai Lord of Wooton Bassetは37歳，母Cecily Berkeleyは24歳であった。1178年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアヒグ ウイコンベでSir Alan Bassetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Aline de Gai(이)가 1159년 영국 윌츠히르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Philip de Gai Lord of Wooton Basset(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cecily Berkeley(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1178년 영국 벅잉함실르 히 윈이코브에서 Sir Alan Basset(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Aline de Gai nasceu em 1159, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Philip de Gai Lord of Wooton Basset, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Cecily Berkeley, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Alan Basset em 1178, em High Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 7 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aline de Gai родилась в 1159 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени Philip de Gai Lord of Wooton Basset было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily Berkeley, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Alan Basset в 1178 г. в местности хаи викомб, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Aline de Gai nació en 1159, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Philip de Gai Lord of Wooton Basset, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Cecily Berkeley, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Sir Alan Basset en 1178, en High Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 7 hijas.
